retry_reason: Put operation is unconditional in terms of refcount; if refcount hits zero, object is freed, retrying would be double-free.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to update tile info from EDID by parsing tiled blocks and optionally releasing the tile group if no tile is present. The drm_mode_put_tile_group call is one conditional step within broader tile detection logic.
